data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for PDF generation for records, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of PDF generation. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement, as the exploratory step did not yield any confirmation of this critical feature.
gaps: No evidence of PDF generation functionality for records.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the PDF generation requirement.
